channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Arsenal’s Premier League lead narrows as Bournemouth claim surprise win
item.description: Arsenal’s dream of winning their first Premier League title in 22 years received a heavy blow at the Emirates Stadium on Saturday, as Bournemouth stunned the home crowd with a 2–1 victory. Teen sensat...

item.title: Canberra Greek Orthodox bishop urges end to illegal fireworks at Easter
item.description: The newly appointed Greek Orthodox bishop of Canberra, Athinagoras Karakonstantakis, has urged the public to stop setting off illegal fireworks during Greek Orthodox Easter celebrations. For over a de...

item.title: RMIT withdraws disciplinary case against student over Gaza criticism
item.description: RMIT University has withdrawn a misconduct case against Gemma Seymour, a fine arts student who publicly criticised the university's ties to weapons companies. The case arose after Seymour posted a vid...

item.title: Unhoused Vancouver residents fear displacement ahead of 2026 FIFA World Cup
item.description: The article examines growing concern among unhoused residents and advocates in Vancouver as the 2026 FIFA World Cup nears and a two‑kilometre “beautification” zone is established around BC Place stadi...

item.title: Global oil disruptions to increase travel and fuel costs for Canadians
item.description: Canadian travellers and the aviation sector are facing rising costs and potential flight disruptions due to global oil supply issues caused by Iran’s blockade of shipments through the Strait of Hormuz...

item.title: Man Impersonating Police Officer Arrested in Southern Metro Manila
item.description: A man posing as a police officer has been apprehended by authorities in Southern Metro Manila. According to reports, the individual was engaging in fraudulent activities, likely exploiting people by l...

item.title: Trump Claims Oil Tankers Are Coming to the U.S. as Iran War Talks Continue
item.description: On April 11, 2026, U.S. President Donald Trump stated on Truth Social that numerous empty oil tankers were en route to the United States to load up with what he described as the world's 'best and swee...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif Hosts US and Iranian Delegations in Islamabad Talks for Regional Peace
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif held separate meetings with American and Iranian delegations in Islamabad on Saturday as part of the important Islamabad Talks. The US team was led by Vice President JD V...

item.title: Eziko apologises for confusion over community leadership event in East London
item.description: Solomon Ogbonna Eziko, previously referred to as the 'Igbo king', has issued a public apology to South African traditional leaders and the wider public following confusion over an event in East London...

item.title: Pakistan hosts historic US-Iran peace talks in Islamabad with PM Shehbaz facilitating separate meetings
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on Saturday held separate meetings with the United States and Iranian delegations in Islamabad, officially starting the ‘Islamabad Talks’ aimed at achieving durable peace...

item.title: Gateway Airline To Begin New Domestic Flight Routes From April 13, 2026
item.description: Gateway Airline don yan say dem go start new flight operations beginning from Monday, April 13, 2026, as part of their plan to improve travel connections and make waka easier for passengers across the...

item.title: Live Updates and Analysis of the 2026 Grand National at Aintree
item.description: The 2026 Grand National at Aintree is currently underway, with extensive live coverage provided by Daily Mail Sport. This year's race features a strong field, including favourites such as I Am Maximus...

item.title: 2028 Presidential Race: Democrats Face Identity Politics and Electability Concerns
item.description: As the 2028 presidential election cycle looms, Democratic candidates are already confronting a recurring dilemma: how to balance the desire for diverse representation with the perceived need for elect...

item.title: New Cyberattack: Claude Code Leak Combined with Malware
item.description: Recent cybersecurity incidents have exposed vulnerabilities and amplified the risks associated with code leaks and malware distribution. A significant breach involved the unauthorized release of code ...

item.title: NASA's Artemis II Mission Successfully Concludes with Safe Orion Splashdown
item.description: NASA’s Artemis II mission has officially concluded after the Orion spacecraft made a flawless splashdown in the Pacific Ocean, marking a major milestone in humanity’s return to lunar exploration. The ...

item.title: JD Vance Holds Talks with Pakistan’s Prime Minister Before Major Iran Negotiations
item.description: In a significant diplomatic move amid heightened tensions in the Middle East, U.S. Senator JD Vance met with Pakistan’s Prime Minister ahead of a series of high-stakes negotiations concerning Iran. Th...

item.title: NASA’s Artemis II astronauts safely return to Earth after historic lunar flyby
item.description: NASA’s Artemis II mission successfully brought astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch, and Canadian astronaut Jeremy Hansen back to Earth following a nine-day journey around the Moon. ...

item.title: KEFFA calls for special livestock fund to protect ASAL farmers from worsening drought
item.description: As the drought situation gets more severe across the Arid and Semi-Arid Lands (ASAL) of Kenya, the Kenya Feed and Fodder Alliance (KEFFA) has raised alarm over the massive losses that livestock farmer...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif Holds Meeting with US Vice President JD Vance during US-Iran Peace Talks in Islamabad
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif met US Vice President JD Vance in Islamabad on Saturday as high-level direct talks between the United States and Iran got under way. These historic negotiations, facilita...

item.title: FIFA confirms Iran will play 2026 World Cup group matches in the United States
item.description: Mexico President Claudia Sheinbaum don confirm say Iran national football team no go shift their 2026 FIFA World Cup matches from the United States to Mexico. She talk am for one press conference afte...
